apps.name: 6SNT.CPT
apps.subtitle: CAT Port Guardian
apps.summary: Read-only COM/CAT preflight guardian for Windows radio stations.
apps.description: Checks visible COM ports, known radio processes and local rig configuration before a session without opening the serial port or sending CAT commands.
apps.notFor: Not a CAT controller. No PTT, TUNE, TX, CW, audio transmit or unattended automation.
safety: Does not open serial ports to take control

apps.name: 6SNT.UADL
apps.subtitle: USB Audio Device Lock
apps.summary: Read-only USB audio preflight for Windows radio stations.
apps.description: Checks whether the expected USB Audio CODEC input, output, levels, sample rate and channel profile are still in place before a digital-mode session.
apps.notFor: Not an audio router, mixer, driver manager or automation tool. It does not change devices, volume, sample rate or Windows audio settings.
features: USB Audio CODEC input/output profile check
safety: Does not change Windows sound configuration
Does not perform PTT, TUNE, TX, CW or macros

apps.name: 6SNT.ACD
apps.subtitle: Audio Chain Doctor
apps.summary: Read-only audio chain preflight and live meter for Windows radio stations.
apps.description: Reads the selected Windows audio input, shows RMS level, VU, waveform, peak and clipping state, and lets the operator verify the local audio path before a session.
apps.notFor: Not a mixer, audio router, driver manager or radio controller. It does not key PTT, control a transceiver or change Windows audio routing.
features: VU, waveform, peak and clipping checks
Confirmed short local 1 kHz tone test
safety: Does not change Windows default audio devices
Does not change volume, sample rate or routing
Does not send CAT, PTT, TUNE, TX, CW or macros
Tone test requires explicit operator confirmation

apps.name: 6SNT.ADIF-HUB
apps.subtitle: Local log cleanup hub
apps.summary: Local-first staging area to clean, normalize and export ham radio log files.
apps.description: Imports ADI, ADX, Cabrillo, CSV, XLSX and JSON, then normalizes records toward ADIF workflows while keeping files local.
apps.notFor: Not a logger. Not a cloud service. It works on copies before data goes somewhere important.
features: ADI / ADX / Cabrillo / CSV / XLSX / JSON
Duplicate review and field conflict workflow
safety: Review exports before uploading to external services
No cloud sync during normal operation
